problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Combining Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
